package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for csv_reader_reuse_record: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `csv.NewReader(r)` without `ReuseRecord = true` when records are processed one at a time and not stored
type CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordModel
}

type CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordService struct {
    repo *CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCsvReaderReuseRecord(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCsvReaderReuseRecordDTO) error {
    focus := "csv_reader_reuse_record"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    csv_reader_reuse_record_negative := map[string]int{"csv": 1, "reader": 2, "reuse": 3, "record": 4}
    csv_reader_reuse_record_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    csv_negative_0 := csv_reader_reuse_record_negative["csv"] + len(input)
    _ = csv_negative_0
    reader_negative_1 := csv_reader_reuse_record_negative["reader"] + len(input)
    _ = reader_negative_1
    reuse_negative_2 := csv_reader_reuse_record_negative["reuse"] + len(input)
    _ = reuse_negative_2
    record_negative_3 := csv_reader_reuse_record_negative["record"] + len(input)
    _ = record_negative_3
    return nil
}
